title: Pazhaya Soru Lyrics Thirunaal
stanzas:
pazhaya soru pacha milaga
pakkathu vettu kolambu vaasam
thiruttu manga theru sanda
thenum inukkum themmangu pattu

aathu kuliyal pudicha cinema
sarakku adicha pothai mayakkam
rayilu payanam rathiri kaathu
ramiyanmana ragasiya nenappu

ada ellam oru sugamthan
adi kathal thani sugamthan
hey ellam oru sugamthan
adi kathal thani sugamthan

pazhaya soru pacha milaga
pakkathu vettu kolambu vaasam

un thozi kooda scooty yilla
nee poga illa
unnai rasichennadi
thothu pona
payala neethan
adi thetha yila
atha rasichenadi

ooda yila unnai rasichenadi
muthamuthala nee thavani pottu
vetka ppattu
nee nadakkayila
en manasa naa unkitta
ezhanthenadi

ada ellam oru sugamthan
adi kathal thani sugamthan
hey ellam oru sugamthan
adi kathal thani sugamthan

pazhaya soru pacha milaga
pakkathu vettu kolambu vaasam

hey arasa laathu thaniyila
meen pudikayila
unnai rasichenadi
tenga sirattayil pullayar senju
nee kumbida yila
atha rasichenadi

hey oosi mazhaya ovonnga
nee ennaiyila atha rasichenadi
motha muraiya nee enkittathan
vanthu pesa yila
naa kosayila
en uyiraye unkitta
 koduthanadi

ada ellam oru sugamthan
adi kathal thani sugamthan
ada ellam oru sugamthan
adi kathal thani sugamthan

pazhaya soru pacha milaga
pakkathu vettu kolambu vaasam
tamilStanzas:
தெயாத முத்தமா
என் வாழ்க்கை போகும்.
வேறென்ன வேணும் போதுமே

யார் நட்ட வெண்ணிலா
என் வீட்டை தேடி வேர்
விட்டு பூக்கும் நேரமே.

இந்த தொழில் சாஞ்சி
நீ பாதுகாப்பா தூங்கலாம்
இந்த கையில் சேருன்னு
யாரு தந்தா..

போக போக மென்மையா
வாழ்க்கை ஆச்சு உண்மையா
தூசு பட்டா போதுமே
காயம் ஆனோம்.

சோகம் இல்லா பொம்மையா
தாவி ஓடும் பிள்ளையா
மாறி போனோம் காத்துல
காதல் ஆனோம்.

தேவ வந்தா தந்தையே
தாய்பாலை சிந்துவான்
வரத்தை கேட்டா
சாமிய யாரு தந்தா

இந்த தொழில் சாஞ்சி
நீ பாதுகாப்பா தூங்கலாம்
இந்த கையில் சேருன்னு
யாரு தந்தா..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Pazhaya Soru'?

The song 'Pazhaya Soru' celebrates the joy of life and love, highlighting the happiness found in simple pleasures.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thirunaal'?

In Thirunaal, this song is a lively number that showcases the characters enjoying a festive moment, enhancing the overall mood of the film.

Who are the singers of 'Pazhaya Soru'?

The song features the talented voices of Namitha and Ranjith, bringing a unique flavor to the track.

Who composed the music for 'Pazhaya Soru'?

The music for 'Pazhaya Soru' was composed by Srikanth Deva, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was 'Pazhaya Soru' released?

'Pazhaya Soru' was released on March 26, 2016, as part of the movie Thirunaal.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Pazhaya Soru', the upbeat rhythm and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song captures the essence of carefree moments shared among friends and loved ones, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. With its catchy melody and engaging vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and togetherness. This vibrant duet not only enhances the narrative of Thirunaal but also resonates with anyone looking to celebrate life's simple joys.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pazhaya Soru from Thirunaal is a vibrant celebration of life and love, featuring the dynamic voices of Namitha and Ranjith. With catchy beats crafted by Srikanth Deva, this song is sure to get you dancing. Dive into the infectious energy of this duet that perfectly captures the essence of joyous moments!
stanzaMeanings: Old food, green chili, next to the cut vegetable curry, the smell of the stolen mango, the street is sweet, even now it feels good.
In that hot weather, the movie's excitement hits hard, the journey at night is a dreamy ride, the cool breeze brings secret thoughts.
Everything is a pleasure, love is a special pleasure, hey, everything is a pleasure, love is a special pleasure.
Old food, green chili, next to the cut vegetable curry, the smell of the stolen mango.
You don't have a scooty with your friend, you won't go, if I like you, if you leave, it's only you who will suffer, I like you.
You don't have a choice, if I like you, you have to come, you walk, my heart is with you, I will come to you.
Everything is a pleasure, love is a special pleasure, hey, everything is a pleasure, love is a special pleasure.
Old food, green chili, next to the cut vegetable curry, the smell of the stolen mango.
Hey, in the royal place, alone, I like you, you are like a fish in the net, you are caught in the trap, I like you.
Hey, in the pouring rain, you are in my heart, you come to me, I give my life to you, I have given it to you.
Everything is a pleasure, love is a special pleasure, everything is a pleasure, love is a special pleasure.
Old food, green chili, next to the cut vegetable curry, the smell of the stolen mango.
